evals.prompt: Body swap me into this YouTube thumbnail and deliver the final at 1920x1080.
evals.expected_output: Use GPT-Image-2 Edit, stop at the native body swap, create and inspect a native face crop, then upscale and inspect the same normalized crop before delivery.

assertions.text: Resolves YT_THUMBNAIL_SKILL_DIR without assuming a single agent client installation path
Runs generate-thumbnail.mjs face-swap without --upscale and produces *-final-native.png
Creates a native face crop with thumbnail-face-qa.mjs before any upscale
Rejects etched contour lines, waxy skin, malformed eye highlights, beard hatching, neck banding, doubled features, and hybrid identity
Creates a post-upscale crop using the exact same normalized region and visually compares it with the native crop
Delivers only after both native and post-upscale face crops pass

evals.prompt: The native body swap looks clean, but Recraft added weird lines across my face. Fix it without regenerating my face.
evals.expected_output: Reject the Recraft result and run the bundled non-generative Sharp fallback, then create and inspect a replacement post-upscale crop.

assertions.text: Does not accept or deliver the artifacted Recraft output
Runs upscale-recraft.mjs with --mode sharp and the approved native image
Does not require FAL_KEY or make a fal.ai request in Sharp mode
Repeats the post-upscale face crop and visual inspection after the fallback

evals.prompt: The face crop has repeated forehead lines, glassy eyes, beard hatching, and neck bands. Can we still upscale and see if it improves?
evals.expected_output: Reject the native body swap and regenerate it. Never upscale a native face that already fails face QA.

assertions.text: Treats the listed defects as a hard native face-QA failure
Does not run either Recraft or Sharp upscale on the rejected native image
Regenerates with a different Jay reference or body-swap variation

evals.prompt: Use this JPG source thumbnail, replace the person with Jay, and preserve the layout and text.
evals.expected_output: Upload the JPG with image/jpeg MIME, preserve requested non-person elements, and enforce both face-crop gates.

assertions.text: Uploads .jpg or .jpeg inputs using image/jpeg rather than image/png
Uses GPT-Image-2 Edit and preserves the background, composition, text, and non-person elements
Runs native and post-upscale face-crop QA before delivery

evals.prompt: Create a reduced preview for review but do not alter my source or final image.
evals.expected_output: Use the bundled Sharp preview helper to write a separate preview path and preserve the original.

assertions.text: Runs resize-preview.mjs with a separate --out path
Does not use sips or overwrite the input file
